questions.question: Design a half adder in Verilog HDL. The inputs are A and B, and the output should be the sum and carry. Write the Verilog code for the half adder and draw its truth table. Explain the logic behind the design (minimum 50 words).

Design a full adder in Verilog HDL. The inputs are A, B, and Cin, and the output should be the sum, carryout, and carry. Write the Verilog code for the full adder and draw its truth table. Explain the logic behind the design (minimum 50 words).

Design a binary adder-subtractor in Verilog HDL. The inputs should be 4-bit numbers A and B, with an optional carry-in and carry-out. Write the Verilog code for the adder-subtractor and draw its truth table. Explain the logic behind the design (minimum 50 words).
